info.title: JSONH CLI
info.description: JSON for Humans as a Command Line Interface.

options.name: --input-path
options.description: The path of the JSONH file to input

options.name: --output-path
options.description: The path of the JSON file to output. If null, logs the output

options.name: --pretty
options.description: Whether to indent the outputted JSON [default: False]

options.name: --lang-version
options.description: The major version of the JSONH specification to use [default: Latest]

options.name: --max-depth
options.description: The maximum recursion depth when reading JSONH [default: 64]

options.name: --big-numbers
options.description: Whether to parse numbers outside the range/precision of a double [default: False]
